mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_PRINT_MODEL( ID, MODEL_TYPE_CODE, MODEL_TYPE_NAME, MODEL_NAME, MODEL_CONTENT, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modelTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
